description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a phase-zero stage with two jobs, alpine-stable and debian-stable, each extending .job-base and running the script `record_stable_image "${DEPENDENCY_PROXY}${ALPINE_IMAGE}"` and `record_stable_image "${DEPENDENCY_PROXY}${DEBIAN_IMAGE}"` respectively. Add a large set of component jobs (certificates, cfssl-self-sign, gitaly, gitaly-init-cgroups, gitlab-agentk, gitlab-base, gitlab-container-registry, gitlab-cosign, gitlab-elasticsearch-indexer, gitlab-exiftool, gitlab-exporter, gitlab-geo-logcursor, gitlab-go, gitlab-gomplate, gitlab-graphicsmagick, gitlab-kas, gitlab-logger, gitlab-mailroom, gitlab-openbao, gitlab-pages, gitlab-python, gitlab-rails-ce, gitlab-rails-ee, gitlab-ruby, gitlab-rust, gitlab-shell, gitlab-sidekiq-ce, gitlab-sidekiq-ee, gitlab-toolbox-ce, gitlab-toolbox-ee, gitlab-webservice-ce, gitlab-webservice-ee, gitlab-workhorse-ce, gitlab-workhorse-ee, gitlab-zoekt, kubectl, postgresql) that each extend a corresponding .gitlab-* template, inherit their stage from the template, and declare optional needs on prerequisite jobs as listed. Include a local include of `.gitlab/ci/ignorable-job-base.gitlab-ci.yml` that runs only when `$PIPELINE_TYPE == "GITLAB_RAILS_UPSTREAM_TRIGGER"`. No global image, services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined; jobs rely on the templates for those details.
